text: A baker puts cupcakes on a cooling rack. She adds the same number of cupcakes every minute. After 1 minute she has 3 cupcakes, after 2 minutes she has 6 cupcakes, after 3 minutes she has 9 cupcakes. How many cupcakes will she have after 4 minutes?
generatorSolution:
The baker adds the same number of cupcakes each minute. The pattern is: 3, 6, 9, ...
Each time, the number goes up by 3 (6 - 3 = 3, and 9 - 6 = 3).
So after 4 minutes: 9 + 3 = 12 cupcakes.
